name: bandit.variable_roster_tiny_dispatch_sizing_live
description: Fixture-backed camp-map product proof: a scout-confirmed remembered lead is evaluated through the real 30-minute live dispatch cadence after the camp roster is shaped to two living ready at-home members. The scenario requires same-run logs and saved state proving reserve/dispatch sizing comes from the current tiny roster: two living, two ready, reserve one, dispatchable one, selected scout instead of impossible stalk pair.
artifact_patterns: camp-map roster living=2 ready_at_home=2 wounded_or_unready=0 active_outside=0 reserve=1 dispatchable=1

steps.label: post_load_tiny_fixture_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: post-load gameplay screen for the 2-member variable-roster remembered-lead fixture; this proves only startup/load and fixture footing before the cadence wait
steps.failure_rule: If the gameplay screen is not visible after load, later dispatch-cadence evidence cannot be credited.

steps.label: preflight_saved_tiny_roster_camp_map_lead
steps.abort_reason: preflight saved bandit_live_world site did not contain the 2-member ready roster plus persisted remembered camp-map lead contract
steps.expected_immediate_state: saved bandit_live_world contains a 2-member camp with all 2 ready at home, no wounded/unready or active-outside members, and a scout-confirmed remembered lead before live cadence proof starts
steps.failure_rule: If the roster shape or remembered lead is missing, later sizing logs cannot be credited as variable-roster live proof.

steps.label: wait_30_minutes_for_tiny_variable_roster_dispatch_cadence
steps.pre_menu_expected_visible_fact: alarm/wait mode menu is visible, then Wait a while is chosen before the duration menu
artifact_state_patterns: camp-map roster living=2 ready_at_home=2 wounded_or_unready=0 active_outside=0 reserve=1 dispatchable=1
steps.expected_visible_fact: the player waited through the real 30-minute overmap NPC cadence window; feature credit depends on same-run debug artifact lines proving 2-member roster sizing, not on the wait UI alone
steps.failure_rule: If the wait is interrupted or the artifact delta lacks the tiny variable-roster sizing line and selected scout count, this scenario is inconclusive/red.

steps.label: open_save_quit_prompt_after_tiny_variable_roster_dispatch
steps.expected_visible_fact: save/quit prompt is visible after the variable-roster dispatch probe
steps.failure_rule: If save/quit cannot be opened, preserve artifacts but do not count the run as a clean saved-state proof.

steps.label: confirm_save_quit_after_tiny_variable_roster_dispatch
steps.expected_visible_fact: save/quit confirmation completed after the variable-roster dispatch probe
steps.failure_rule: If save/quit confirmation is unproven, preserve artifacts but do not count the run as fully green without reviewing cleanup status.

steps.label: audit_saved_tiny_variable_roster_scout
steps.abort_reason: saved bandit_live_world did not persist the expected 2-member roster outcome: 1 still-ready at home and 1 active scout member(s)
steps.expected_immediate_state: after save/quit, saved bandit_live_world contains the same 2-member camp with an active scout dispatch: 1 active outside member(s) and 1 ready at home
steps.failure_rule: If active dispatch state or the expected ready/active roster split is missing, same-run log sizing cannot close product proof by itself.

steps.label: audit_tiny_variable_roster_dispatch_artifact
required_line_patterns: camp-map roster living=2 ready_at_home=2 wounded_or_unready=0 active_outside=0 reserve=1 dispatchable=1
steps.abort_reason: same-run debug artifact did not show 2-member roster inputs, reserve/dispatchable numbers, selected scout count, no live signal, and live local-gate dispatch
steps.failure_rule: No variable-roster product-proof credit if the artifact lacks the roster/reserve/dispatchable line and the live local-gate line from the same run.

evidence_contract.claim: Fixture-backed camp-map product proof: a scout-confirmed remembered lead is evaluated through the real 30-minute live dispatch cadence after the camp roster is shaped to two living ready at-home members. The scenario requires same-run logs and saved state proving reserve/dispatch sizing comes from the current tiny roster: two living, two ready, reserve one, dispatchable one, selected scout instead of impossible stalk pair.
evidence_contract.load_only_verdict: load proof only / inconclusive for tiny variable-roster dispatch sizing
evidence_contract.failure_rule: No feature-proof credit if startup/load, saved preflight roster shape, saved remembered lead, real wait/cadence action, same-run dispatch-plan artifact, roster/reserve/dispatchable/selected-member fields, local-gate dispatch line, save/writeback, and saved active roster split are not all green/matched.
